subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath attained unto the lights of divine knowledge in the days of his Lord, the Most Merciful, that the fragrance of remembrance might draw him unto a station that calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن فاز بانوار العرفان فی ایام ربه الرحمن لیجذبه عرف الذکر الی مقام یدع
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
